versions.name: config-schema-baseline
remove-legacy-config-metadata
versions.snapshot:
-- table: config_revisions
create table config_revisions ( revision integer primary key , config_json text not null , source text not null , created_at text not null ) strict;

versions.name: config-command-receipts
versions.sql:
CREATE TABLE config_command_receipts (
  command_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  operation_kind TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  revision INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES config_revisions(revision),
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL
) STRICT;
